channel.title: Simple Patch Finder - Security and Critical RSS
channel.description: Latest security and critical patches from Simple Patch Finder.

item.title: Portal for ArcGIS Security 2026 Update 1 Patch (PFA-115-P-1416)
item.description: Version: 11.5 | Criticality: Security | Release date: 04/14/2026 | Products: ArcGIS Enterprise, Portal for ArcGIS | Esri patch page: https://support.esri.com/en-us/patches-updates/2026/portal-for-arcgis-security-2026-update-1-patch
